title: CheckTaskGeneratorMismatchReport
description:
Output ``data`` block for ``check-task-generator-mismatch`` (WS5 #9).

Wraps inside the standard SuccessEnvelope's ``data`` field (see
envelope.json). ``match`` is the short-circuit signal most callers read
first: true means the cached interview is authoritative and Step 3
continues; false is the seam where ``hpc-submit`` branches on
``on_task_generator_mismatch``. On a mismatch both canonical forms + their
sha256 are returned so the caller can surface BOTH shapes in a
``task_generator_mismatch`` envelope.

match.title: Match
match.description: True when the two generators' canonical JSON is byte-identical, OR when no cached generator was supplied (vacuous match).

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: ``identical`` (canonical forms equal), ``divergent`` (canonical forms differ), or ``no_cached_generator`` (no cached generator to compare; vacuous match).

caller.title: Caller
caller.description: The caller-supplied generator's canonical JSON + sha256.

cached.title: Cached
cached.description: The cached generator's canonical JSON + sha256, or null when none was supplied.

GeneratorDigest.title: GeneratorDigest
GeneratorDigest.description: One generator's canonical form + content hash.

canonical.title: Canonical
canonical.description: Key-sorted, whitespace-free canonical JSON of the generator.

sha256.title: Sha256
sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the canonical JSON — cheap downstream equality / logging key.
